name: SAES Getters S.p.A.
summary: SAES Getters S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and markets components and systems for industrial and scientific applications in Italy and internationally. It operates through three segments: Industrial, Medical, and Packaging. The company offers getters and dispensers for a range of industrial applications, such as electronic vacuum devices, microelectronic and micromechanical systems, image diagnostic systems, thermal insulation, and lamps and vacuum systems; shape memory alloy components and devices for home automation, white goods industry, consumer electronics, automotive sector, and luxury goods; and polymeric composites for organic and hybrid electronic applications, and photonics and implantable medical devices. It also provides cathodes and materials for thermal dissipation in electronic tubes and lasers; pumps based on non-evaporable getter (NEG) materials for use in industrial and scientific fields; and vacuum thermal insulation solutions, which include NEG products for cryogenic, solar collectors, and thermos applications. In addition, the company offers Nitinol shape memory alloys (SMA) for use in biomedical sector; and SMA actuator devices for the industrial sector, such as domotics, white goods industry, consumer electronics, automotive, and luxury sector. Further, it provides plastic films for the food packaging sector; and materials and components for functional chemical systems applications. The company also serves flexible packaging, lighting, renewable energy, scientific equipment and research facilities, and security and defense markets. SAES Getters S.p.A. was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Lainate, Italy.
